content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run a Demand Planning discovery session. New launch or existing SKU?
New product launch — a luxury eye cream, first run.
DTC e-commerce first, then specialty retail (Credo, Follain) within 3 months.
3,000 units. Based on DTC subscriber base and projected conversion rate.
Yes — Q4 holiday season drives about 40% of annual eye cream sales.
Airless pump bottles: 10-12 weeks. Eyeliss/Haloxyl actives: 6-8 weeks.
Eyeliss and Haloxyl are single-source from Givaudan. No backup supplier currently.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
